name: Seven Brothers Burgers
tagline: Samoan-Hawaiian family joint in Laie — the banana bread alone is worth the stop, the burgers are a bonus.
mustOrder: Shez's Paniolo burger (thick patties, homemade onion rings, grilled pineapple, bacon, BBQ sauce)
parking: Lot in front of the restaurant on Kamehameha Hwy
talkStory: Founded 2009 by Art and Peggy Hannemann (bought the former Kahuku Grill). Opened Laie location specifically to serve locals and BYU-Hawaii students. The banana bread sells out early — get there before noon if that's your priority. Great stop on a North Shore loop. The seven brothers are literally seven brothers from the Hannemann family.
